description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring a vibrant magenta label. The front of the can displays the bold, stylized text 'Berry Splash' in large, playful letters, suggesting a berry-flavored beverage. The side of the can includes a detailed nutritional information panel, indicating it is a low sodium drink with 140 calories per can. The can's surface has a glossy finish, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The pull tab on the top is standard for canned drinks, allowing easy opening. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments like parks, sidewalks, or convenience stores.
description: A tall, magenta-colored can labeled 'Berry Splash' with a metallic top and a glossy finish, featuring nutritional information and a standard pull tab.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'Berry Splash' logo prominently on a magenta background with a metallic top.
description_view_1: This side view reveals part of the nutritional information panel and the calorie count, with the logo partially visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full nutritional facts panel and product details, with less emphasis on branding.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the logo, with mostly magenta color and minimal text or graphics.
